description_long: This object consists of three pairs of shoes arranged vertically: a pair of brown lace-up sneakers, a pair of black slip-on dress shoes, and a pair of dark gray open-toe sandals. The brown sneakers feature white laces and a textured sole, with a rounded toe and visible stitching along the sides. The black dress shoes have a smooth, polished finish with a low heel and a streamlined silhouette, lacking any visible laces or fasteners. The dark gray sandals have a simple design with wide straps crossing over the top of the foot and a flat sole, suitable for casual wear. Each pair is distinct in style, material, and intended use, reflecting a range of urban footwear options. The shoes appear clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A set of three pairs of shoes: brown lace-up sneakers, black slip-on dress shoes, and dark gray open-toe sandals, each clean and distinct in style.
description_view_0: Three pairs of shoes stacked vertically: brown sneakers on top, black dress shoes in the middle, and gray sandals at the bottom, all viewed from a side angle.
description_view_1: Front view showing the toe areas of all three pairs: the open fronts of the sandals, the rounded toes of the dress shoes, and the laced fronts of the sneakers.
description_view_2: Side view from the opposite direction, highlighting the outer sides of the sandals, dress shoes, and sneakers, with the sneakers' laces and stitching visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the heels and back profiles of all three pairs, with the brown sneakers' heel tabs and the open backs of the sandals visible.
attribute_lacing_style: standard criss-cross (sneakers), no laces (dress shoes and sandals)
